title: LessJS — Less is More
text: DSD-first Web Standards framework. Zero-runtime core, SSG + Island architecture with Lit Web Components and Hono API routes.

title: Framework Positioning
text: Understand what LessJS solves and what it doesn't solve yet. Compare with Astro, Fresh, Next.js.

title: Getting Started
text: Create a new project, start the dev server, build and preview the static output.

title: Architecture
text: Build pipeline, rendering model, island upgrade strategy, and production boundaries.

title: Routing
text: File-based routing with Hono, dynamic routes with [slug], catch-all routes, renderers and middleware.

title: Rendering & SSG
text: SSG 3-phase build pipeline, DSD templates, island client entries, HTML output.

title: DSD Rendering
text: Declarative Shadow DOM rendering model. Three layers: dsd-static, dsd-interactive, pure-island.

title: Island Upgrade
text: Island upgrade strategies: eager, lazy, idle, visible. Custom Elements that upgrade independently.

title: Island Deep Dive
text: Component layers, DSD hydration mixin, property serialization, lifecycle management.

title: RPC
text: Type-safe RPC with RpcController. Auto-loading state management, retry with exponential backoff.

title: API Routes
text: Hono-based API routes with route-level middleware, CORS, CSP headers.

title: Configuration
text: Vite config, SSR options, island settings, HTML injection, PWA configuration.

title: Security & Middleware
text: CSP, CORS, input validation, middleware stack, nonce support.

title: Deployment
text: Deploy to Deno Deploy, Vercel, Cloudflare Workers, or any static host.

title: Error Handling
text: SSR error rendering, structured error responses, LessError hierarchy.

title: Testing
text: Testing strategies for SSG output, Lit components, Hono API routes, and island interactions.

title: PWA Support
text: Service worker generation, manifest, offline support, speculative loading.

title: Content System
text: Blog, nav, and sitemap modules. Unified content plugin with opt-in architecture.

title: Design System
text: @lessjs/ui component library: layout, button, input, dialog, code-block, theme-toggle, hero-ping.

title: Web Awesome
text: Icon set integration with Web Awesome for LessJS applications.

title: Roadmap
text: Version roadmap from v0.6 through v1.0. Current focus, planned features, and future direction.

title: Architecture Decisions
text: Architecture Decision Records documenting key technical decisions and trade-offs.

title: Changelog
text: Release history and changelog for all LessJS versions.

title: Blog
text: LessJS framework blog posts and updates.

title: Contributing
text: How to contribute to LessJS: development setup, testing, pull request workflow.

title: Community
text: GitHub, discussions, issue tracker, and JSR package links.
